'''竏營-ch-f-j''' ('''kazachfejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wtfpwn|wtfpwn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ch-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wtfpwn|wtfpwn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-ch-f-j
|-
! Lemma
| kazachfejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizachfejoko|thizachfejoko]] || [[word:jizachfejoko|jizachfejoko]] || [[word:shizachfejoko|shizachfejoko]] || [[word:kizachfejoko|kizachfejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzachfejoko|thuthuzachfejoko]] || [[word:jujuzachfejoko|jujuzachfejoko]] || [[word:shushuzachfejoko|shushuzachfejoko]] || [[word:kukuzachfejoko|kukuzachfejoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzachfejoko|thuzachfejoko]] || [[word:juzachfejoko|juzachfejoko]] || [[word:shuzachfejoko|shuzachfejoko]] || [[word:kuzachfejoko|kuzachfejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozachfejoko|thozachfejoko]] || [[word:jozachfejoko|jozachfejoko]] || [[word:shozachfejoko|shozachfejoko]] || [[word:kozachfejoko|kozachfejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzachfejoko|thﾃｦzachfejoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦzachfejoko|jﾃｦzachfejoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦzachfejoko|shﾃｦzachfejoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦzachfejoko|kﾃｦzachfejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazachfejoko|thathazachfejoko]] || [[word:jajazachfejoko|jajazachfejoko]] || [[word:shashazachfejoko|shashazachfejoko]] || [[word:kakazachfejoko|kakazachfejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazachfejoko|thazachfejoko]] || [[word:jazachfejoko|jazachfejoko]] || [[word:shazachfejoko|shazachfejoko]] || [[word:kazachfejoko|kazachfejoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
